sentences.target: Je vais chez le barbier après le travail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ ʃe lə baʁ.bje a.pʁɛ lə tʁa.vaj/

translations.fr: Je vais chez le barbier après le travail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ ʃe lə baʁ.bje a.pʁɛ lə tʁa.vaj/
translations.en: I'm going to the barber after work.
translations.es: Voy a la barbería después del trabajo.
translations.de: Ich gehe nach der Arbeit zum Barbier.
translations.it: Vado dal barbiere dopo il lavoro.
translations.ru: Я иду к парикмахеру после работы.
translations.pt: Vou ao barbeiro depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Tôi đi cắt tóc sau giờ làm.
translations.nl: Ik ga na het werk naar de kapper.
translations.uk: Я йду до перукаря після роботи.
translations.hi: मैं काम के बाद नाई के पास जा रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Πηγαίνω στον κουρέα μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg går til barbereren etter jobb.
translations.id: Saya pergi ke tukang cukur setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Jag går till barberaren efter jobbet.
translations.da: Jeg går til barberen efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 仕事の後で床屋に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb 'vais'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs the locative PP 'chez le barbier' and temporal PP 'après le travail'.
Preposition used for someone's place/business; introduces the locative complement 'le barbier'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'barbier'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'chez' (destination/place).
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'travail'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'après' (temporal reference).

sentences.target: On cherche un barbier pas trop cher.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ baʁ.bje pɑ tʁo ʃɛʁ/

translations.fr: On cherche un barbier pas trop cher.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ baʁ.bje pɑ tʁo ʃɛʁ/
translations.en: We're looking for a barber that's not too expensive.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un barbero que no sea muy caro.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen Barbier, der nicht zu teuer ist.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un barbiere che non costi troppo.
translations.ko: 너무 비싸지 않은 이발소를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找不太贵的理发店。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊唔太貴嘅理髮店。
translations.ru: Мы ищем не слишком дорогого парикмахера.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um barbeiro que não seja muito caro.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים ספר שלא יעלה יותר מדי.
translations.tr: Çok pahalı olmayan bir berber arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một tiệm cắt tóc không quá đắt.
translations.ar: نبحث عن حلاق ليس غاليًا جدًا.
translations.nl: We zoeken een kapper die niet te duur is.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо перукаря, який не надто дорогий.
translations.hu: Olyan borbélyt keresünk, aki nem túl drága.
translations.hi: हम ऐसे नाई की तलाश कर रहे हैं जो बहुत महंगा न हो।
translations.pl: Szukamy fryzjera, który nie jest zbyt drogi.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε για κουρέα που να μην είναι πολύ ακριβός.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en barberer som ikke er for dyr.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari tukang cukur yang tidak terlalu mahal.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en barberare som inte är för dyr.
translations.ro: Căutăm un frizer care să nu fie prea scump.
translations.cs: Hledáme holiče, který není moc drahý.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en barber, der ikke er for dyr.
translations.fi: Etsimme parturia, joka ei ole liian kallis.
translations.ja: あまり高くない理容室を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun (3rd person singular), often meaning 'we'; subject of 'cherche'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'un barbier' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'barbier'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adverb of negation; here used with 'trop' to attenuate the degree of the adjective 'cher'.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'cher'.
Adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'barbier', graded by 'pas trop'.

translations.it: Il mio barbiere è chiuso oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 내가 다니는 이발소가 문을 닫았어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我常去的理发店今天关门了。
translations.yue: 我成日去嗰間理髮店今日冇開門。
translations.vi: Tiệm cắt tóc tôi hay đến hôm nay đóng cửa.
translations.ar: صالون الحلاقة الذي أذهب إليه مغلق اليوم.
translations.hi: मेरी नाई की दुकान आज बंद है।
translations.el: Το κουρείο μου είναι κλειστό σήμερα.
translations.nb: Barbereren min er stengt i dag.
translations.id: Barbershop langganan saya tutup hari ini.
translations.sv: Min barberare har stängt i dag.
translations.da: Min barber har lukket i dag.
translations.ja: いつも行く床屋は今日は休みです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular; agrees with and modifies 'barbier'.
Common noun, masculine; syntactic subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), masculine singular; predicate complement with 'est'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the whole clause, indicating time.

sentences.target: Nous prenons rendez-vous chez le barbier.

translations.fr: Nous prenons rendez-vous chez le barbier.
translations.en: We're booking an appointment at the barber's.
translations.es: Vamos a pedir cita en la barbería.
translations.de: Wir machen einen Termin beim Barbier.
translations.yue: 我哋喺理髮店預約時間。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đặt lịch tại tiệm cắt tóc.
translations.nl: We maken een afspraak bij de kapper.
translations.hi: हम नाई के यहाँ अपॉइंटमेंट बुक कर रहे हैं।
translations.id: Kami membuat janji di tukang cukur.
translations.sv: Vi bokar en tid hos barberaren.
translations.ja: 床屋の予約をしています。

Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, takes 'rendez-vous' as direct object.
Compound noun, masculine invariable; direct object of 'prenons'.
